resources.string: A clean and elegant local music player
This system folder path is not supported
Folder added. You can scan manually for new content.
There are no songs yet. Scan music now?
Scan M3U / M3U8 playlist files on this device and import them into Halcyon? If you skip this, you can still enable automatic scanning in Settings.
No local M3U / M3U8 playlists found
Move floating lyrics back to the upper middle of the screen to avoid blocking the status bar
Please grant floating window permission first
Show compact floating lyrics in the empty status bar area, with touch passthrough for notification shade gestures
Shows lyrics via Android heads-up notifications on non-Flyme devices. You may need to allow pop-up notifications for this channel.
Shows lyrics via Android heads-up notifications on non-Flyme devices
Hide floating lyrics while playback is paused, then restore them when playback resumes
Reserve extra vertical space for cutouts and the status bar
Adjust the usable lyric width in status-bar mode; long lines wrap automatically
Adjust the usable width of the normal desktop lyric overlay
Fine tune the lyric position after the left, center, or right anchor is applied
Adjust the opacity of status lyric translation or pronunciation text
Show same-timeline original and translation/pronunciation on one line
Force Simplified Chinese for the app UI
Force Traditional Chinese for the app UI
Force English for the app UI
Force Japanese for the app UI
Force Korean for the app UI
Force German for the app UI
Force Russian for the app UI
Force Turkish for the app UI
Force Indonesian for the app UI
Force Vietnamese for the app UI
Force Thai for the app UI
Force French for the app UI
Theme, language, liquid glass, custom images, and home layout
Scan sources, folders, separators, tag scraping, and desktop shortcuts
Ella assistant, OpenAI-compatible endpoints, and MCP server
Manage local directories, USB directories, and hidden folders
Lyricon, desktop lyrics, status bar lyrics, and car lyrics
Playback, decoding, shuffle, and audio focus
Back up and restore settings, playlists, history, stats, and sources
Clear WebDAV and LX artwork, lyrics, and remote metadata cache
Online artwork and lyric cache cleared
Clear library search and tag snapshots; they will be regenerated on the next search
View detailed logs, warnings, and crash records

%1$d logs, showing %2$d; errors %3$d, warnings %4$d. Halcyon automatically captures this process logcat, network failures, and key playback, lyric, and scan logs, keeping at most the last %5$d days and 3000 records.
This will clear all %1$d persisted logs. This cannot be undone.
Gaussian Blur: stable and power efficient
Liquid Glass: blur with refraction for more depth
Search stays fixed; you can configure 4 additional entries
Choose the app light or dark appearance
Show albums, genres, years, and similar pages in %1$d columns
Merge album artists into the artist list and show a release albums tab on artist pages
Automatically open the player after starting local, WebDAV, or online songs
Show Play Next in song lists
Show the quick action beside duration in song lists; turning it off keeps the action in the song menu
Turn off to preview and share the original lyrics only
Aspect Pro requires a local audio file
Could not open Aspect Pro. Make sure it is installed
Audio recording permission is required to enable visualization
Visualization is available in immersive cover mode or landscape playback on large-screen devices
This song has no artist information to open
This song has no album information to open
No NetEase Cloud Music information available
Playback will pause after the current song
This system cannot open the media output panel directly. Bluetooth settings opened instead
Adjust the current song’s lyric timeline. Positive values show lyrics later; negative values show them earlier.
No audio session is available right now
Adjust the opacity of the player visualizer waveform and flowing background
Check the latest version on GitHub Releases
Fetching the latest version from GitHub Releases
This release does not include a changelog.
Connecting to GitHub to fetch the latest Halcyon release.
Current version v%1$s. Tap to view the latest APK and changelog.
Current version v%1$s. No newer release is available right now.
Can only call local songs for playback; it will not delete or modify songs. Library: %1$d songs
Reading AI settings and generating a playlist…
AI can be wrong; it can only read the library and play local songs
What do you want to hear next?
Ask AI to recommend from your library, recent playback, and listening stats, or to explain your music taste.
Recommend a set of songs for tonight based on what I recently played
Summarize my recent favorite artists and genres
Pick songs I rarely play but may like from my library
No music files found. They may be excluded by blocked-folder rules.
Scan complete: %1$d songs\n%2$d added, %3$d updated, %4$d deleted
Scan all music in the system media library
Overview, audio format, and quality stats
%1$d directories; use the plus button to add more
Remove this USB directory? Files on the USB drive will not be deleted.
No songs in these folders yet
Enter a name and select at least one folder
Delete \"%1$s\"? Music files will not be deleted.
Remove “%1$s”? The local folder will not be deleted.
%1$d folders are excluded. Tap to manage or unblock.
Search songs, artists, albums, or filenames
This folder has no music files
Remote directory is empty or has no playable audio
Please enter a WebDAV address first
HTTP 400: WebDAV request format rejected by server. Make sure the address points to a WebDAV root or subdirectory
HTTP 404: Path does not exist. Please verify the WebDAV address
HTTP 405: Server does not allow PROPFIND. Make sure you entered a WebDAV address
HTTP %1$d: Unexpected server redirect. Check whether the WebDAV address needs a trailing slash
HTTP %1$d: WebDAV server returned an error
Cannot resolve host. Please check the address or network
Connection timed out. Please check the server address and network
TLS/certificate verification failed. Please check the HTTPS certificate
Plaintext HTTP connection blocked by the system. Please reinstall and try again
When enabled, Halcyon requests microphone permission to read the current playback spectrum.
Adjust playback volume automatically from audio tags
Prefer album gain, then fall back to track gain
When returning to a previously played song, continue from where you left
When enabled, playback will no longer take audio focus from other apps
Shuffle one song after launch and library load, starting from the beginning
Restore the last queue and continue from the last position after launch
Use only the Android system decoder; unsupported formats will fail to play
Fallback to FFmpeg only when the system decoder cannot handle the format
Route media output to a USB DAC when one is detected
Shuffle the queue and try not to repeat songs within one round
Pick songs randomly every time, so repeats can happen back to back
Each new song is inserted directly after the current song
Songs added in sequence keep the same order after the current song
Always switch to the previous song in the queue
Replay the current song after 20 seconds; within 20 seconds it still jumps to the previous song
Visible sections, home section order, and library grid order
The music library entry block on the home page
Combine multiple folders into dynamic playlists
Automatically start playback when a Bluetooth audio device connects
Show semi-transparent circular outlines on playback control buttons in non-immersive mode
Show shortcut buttons on home screen
Show a + button on the top-right of home section cards to add desktop shortcuts
Export settings, playlists, history, stats, and online sources
Restore app data from a backup JSON
Export settings, playlists, history, stats, AI chats, and online sources
Restore settings, playlists, history, stats, and online sources from JSON
Export a Prism Music-compatible sessions JSON
Import Halcyon or Prism Music listening stats JSON
Includes play history, rankings, and calendar stats; suitable for restoring in Halcyon
Export as Prism Music sessions JSON for use with other compatible apps
Unable to open the backup file
Unable to read the backup file
This is a listening history backup. Please restore from the listening history section.
This is a settings backup. Please restore from the settings section.
Login username for the WebDAV server
Login password for the WebDAV server
Path on the WebDAV server for app-data files
Upload complete app data to a WebDAV server
Download and restore app data from a WebDAV server
Please configure a WebDAV server URL first
Backup file not found on the WebDAV server
Open this song for tag editing in Lyrico
Send a content Uri to Music Tag for editing
Pause after the current song finishes
External editing is not supported for online / WebDAV songs
Lyrico, LunaBeat, or Music Tag was not found. Install one and try again.
Write permission is required to save
LunaBeat lyric timing was not found. Install it and try again.
Halcyon passes the current song path to the selected app and refreshes this song after you return.
Search songs, albums, artists, tags, or lyrics
Search songs, albums, artists, tags, or lyrics
Clear all search history? This cannot be undone.
Search the music library, or quickly find duplicate songs
No duplicate songs with the same title and album were found
Read local video cover files and request video or gallery permission only when needed
Grant video permission in system settings before enabling dynamic cover
Video permission not granted, dynamic cover was disabled
One root folder per line. Supports Song/, Album/, or flat mp4 cover layouts.
After enabling and choosing an image, show it for about 3 seconds whenever Halcyon opens
Show a custom wallpaper behind library, album, playlist, folder, and similar pages
Only shown on tablet landscape player pages and phone non-immersive player pages
Show a small badge at the bottom-right of the non-immersive player cover for Hi-Res tracks
Uses the built-in Hi-Res badge when no image is selected
Restore the unselected state and delete the image copy saved in Halcyon
Extend the album cover to the top of the player; disable it to use the compact rounded cover layout
When off, only dragging changes playback progress. When on, tapping anywhere on the playback-page progress bar seeks directly.
Turn off to stop album covers from changing songs on horizontal swipes and avoid accidental skips.
Show total song duration on the progress bar
When off, the right side shows remaining time. When on, it shows the total song duration.
Show song annotation on player pages
Controls annotation text on the player, lyrics, and landscape player pages
Show Favorites and Five-star entries on playlist page
When off, the playlist page only shows custom playlists; favorites and ratings stay available as library filters
Render lyrics with the default app font
Song title, artist and annotation on the player and lyric pages follow the custom font; off uses the global font
Desktop lyric follows the custom font; off uses the system default font
Use italic styling on the lyric page
Use the normal upright style on the lyric page
Spring River Flower Moon Night Shape of You 123
Control the top featured card on the home page
Control the AI recommendation card on the home page
Used for song AI interpretation and stored only on this device
OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions endpoint; /chat/completions is appended automatically
For example %1$s; change it to any model available to your account
Preview and shared cards follow the lyric page custom font and weight
Leave blank to show Halcyon; fill a name to show by @name
Shortcut label shown when long-pressing the app icon on the launcher
Scan music files automatically on startup
Scan M3U / M3U8 files on startup and merge them into local playlists
Filter audio files shorter than %1$d seconds
One per line; for example /, feat., &
One per line; these names are protected before separator splitting
One per line; used for genre classification
One per line; for example compound genre names containing /
Merge tags that differ only by letter case, such as LiSA and LISA
Show the current lyric in the mini player while playing; disable it to show the song title and artist
Open it, then long press and drag an item to adjust the loading order
Read TTML LYRICS from audio tags first
Show lyric translation when the mini player is displaying lyrics
Rotate the mini player cover during playback; disable it to keep a static cover
Send pronunciation or romanization as the secondary line to Lyricon
Show the current lyric above other apps using a floating window
Prevent the floating lyric window from being dragged; unlock it here or from the lock notification
Increase the display size of the main lyric and pronunciation
Scale the translation line independently for desktop lyrics
Reduce this to make the lyric lighter; the value is kept even when locked
Publish per-word lyrics to the SuperLyric ecosystem through SuperLyricApi
Disable this to send only the original text without a translation line through SuperLyricApi
Send pronunciation or romanization as the secondary line through SuperLyricApi
Send the current original lyric through the Lyric Getter API
Show lyrics through ticker notifications on Meizu devices
Reuse the playback notification and update only the ticker to avoid showing an extra lyric notification in the shade.
Write the translation into the notification body so Samsung floating notifications can try to show two lines.
When the FLYme lyric notification is hidden, Halcyon reuses the playback notification and cannot also write into the Samsung floating notification body.
Show pronunciation or secondary line in status bar
Send the pronunciation or translation secondary line as the second line of the status bar lyric.
Send full LRC lyrics to ColorOS Lock Screen Island through MediaMetadata["lyricInfo"]. Some system builds may still restrict supported apps.
Write the current lyric into the media notification title for Bluetooth devices, car head units, or media centers.
Send translation to media notification lyrics
Replace the media artist line with the current lyric translation.
Send pronunciation to media notification lyrics
Replace the media artist line with the current pronunciation or romanization.
Listening time starts accumulating after you play music
Play counts start accumulating after you play music
Based on local playback records in %1$s
Not enough listening records this month yet
Your taste profile will appear after more playback
Daily listening time over the last 8 weeks
Recently played items will appear here after you start playback
This launcher does not support pinned shortcuts
Delete playlist “%1$s”? Songs in the playlist will not be removed from local storage.
Delete these %1$d playlists? Songs in the playlists will not be removed from local storage.
Songs you heart on the player page will be collected here
Songs rated five stars in file tags will appear here
This playlist does not contain any songs yet
Remove “%2$s” from “%1$s”? The local file will not be deleted.
Remove the selected %1$d songs from this playlist? Local files will not be deleted.
Clear existing custom playlists and import again
Merge and replace playlists with the same name
Keep other playlists and overwrite same-name playlists with imported content
Merge and keep playlists with the same name
For same-name playlists, append only songs that are not already present
Export local song paths line by line
Export a UTF-8 #EXTM3U playlist including song info and local paths
Export a .m3u playlist for apps that only recognize the M3U extension
Denying notification permission will not affect playback. If notifications do not appear on vivo / iQOO, please enable it manually in system settings.
Failed to add as next up
No artist page is available for this song
No album page is available for this song
Remove “%1$s” from the current playlist? The local file will not be deleted.
Delete “%1$s” permanently? This may remove the local audio file.
Remove “%1$s” from the library? The local file will not be deleted.
Tap to view linked NetEase info
No songs found. Tap the refresh button in the top-right corner to scan again.
Delete the selected %1$d songs permanently? This may remove the local audio files.
Go to Settings > Preferences > AI interpretation and fill in the OpenAI API key first.
Loading song info and lyrics, then requesting OpenAI interpretation...
No navigable NetEase information could be parsed
Unable to open the NetEase link
No %1$s info yet. Refresh the library and try again.
Import an LX source to search on the LX Music page
Import or select a source first
Queue songs are no longer valid
Online song is no longer valid
Tap the gear icon to import or select an LX source
Import an LX source to search online songs
Search and tap a song to play online
Library is empty. Please scan local songs first.
AI did not return any playable songs
Please enter the OpenAI API key in settings first.
Reference for player cover blur background and lyric visual effects
Reference for dynamic backgrounds, fullscreen lyrics, and lyric visual experience
Reference for some UI visuals and effects
Playback, media session, and ExoPlayer extensions (Apache-2.0)
Software decoding for ALAC and other audio formats (LGPL-2.1)
Subtitle Provider API and status bar lyrics (Apache-2.0)
Lyric Getter original lyric delivery API (LGPL-2.1)
Reference for song tag reading and app log page (Apache-2.0)
Per-word karaoke lyric rendering and animation effects (Apache-2.0)
Reference for NetEase Cloud Music 163 key decryption (MIT)
Liquid glass and background blur effects (Apache-2.0)
Online music source and API adaptation reference (Apache-2.0)
Lyric parsing and TTML/LRC structure reference (Apache-2.0)
Please select an LX source first
Failed to resolve playback URL: HTTP %1$d
Source did not return a playback URL
Source resolution failed: could not obtain playback URL
Source resolution failed: internal server error
Source resolution failed: too many requests
Allow AI assistants (like Claude) to control music playback via MCP protocol
Audio effects are not supported on this device, or start playback and then adjust.
Pick a font from the system
Use Monet to generate the global accent color
Enable an online lyric source in settings first
Writing lyrics to online songs is not supported yet
Manage Lyrico plugin sources used to match lyrics for local songs
No lyric source plugins imported yet
Do not treat header tags as lyrics
Ignore [ti:], [ar:], [trans:], empty timestamps, //, and other header or placeholder lines
%1$d rule(s) added; regular expressions are supported, and matching whole lyric lines are hidden and not sent to external lyric outputs
One regex or keyword per line, for example: ^(Lyrics by|Composer|Studio)
Use the top-right button to import a Lyrico plugin zip; imported sources appear here and join per-song lyric matching.
Full-screen immersive — hides the system status and navigation bars, ideal for car displays
These are TTML lyrics. Choose which tag to write.
Adjust the strength of the custom app wallpaper.
Add a dark or light wash above the wallpaper to keep text readable.
Adjust the frosted overlay behind lists and detail pages when a custom wallpaper is enabled.
Adjust the strength of the custom player background image.
Add a dark wash above the custom player background.
Static background saves resources; dynamic background uses more vivid cover colors.
Adjust the background opacity of home library and online music cards.
Customize each home library and online music tile color.
Embedded cover will be removed after saving.
Configured and ready as an online source
Configure this remote source in source management first
Higher values make the circular background texture move faster
Adjust the softness of the dynamic background
Adjust the overall brightness of the dynamic background
